title: elymus elongatiformis
intro: Elymus elongatiformis, also known as the narrowleaf wheatgrass or elongated wheat grass, is a type of perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate conditions such as fever and rheumatism. The health benefits of Elymus elongatiformis include its ability to boost the immune system, improve digestion, and lower blood pressure. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as tea, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
